title: pouteria laurentii
intro: Pouteria laurentii, also known as the laurentii tree, is a tropical evergreen species native to the Caribbean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where its bark and leaves are used to treat various health conditions. The bark and leaves of Pouteria laurentii have been reported to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or used in tinctures to harness their medicinal properties.
